name: Mianserin calcium-homeostasis aged-mouse study
summary: A preclinical study testing whether restoring calcium homeostasis with mianserin lowers senescence/SASP signaling in human-derived cells and improves aging phenotypes in mouse models.
model_system: Cells derived from Hutchinson-Gilford progeria syndrome patients and naturally aging humans, LmnaG609G/G609G progeroid mice, and naturally aged mice
